docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF GERRY CRUZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEMPER INSURANCE, REPRESENTED BY BECKY TAYLOR, FIELD INVESTIGATOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 **AGENT FOR SERVICE ADDRESS AMENDED** FILED BY CRUZ, GERRY AS TO DEFENDANT KEMPER INSURANCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, GERRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEMPER INSURANCE $3,330.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,405.00, *74 DAYS OF REASONABLE STORAGE FEES X $45.00 PER DAY. ** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
